languages.text: "Говоря проще: да, здесь использованы технологии других рас, но тебе об этом знать не полагается". {n}Маражай не отводит насмешливого взгляда от техножреца.{/n} "Иногда я поражаюсь, насколько примитивно искусство обмана у {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}. Побольше затейливых слов, щепотка таинственности, и вот твои слова уже внушают священный трепет".

traits.locale_text: "Говоря проще: да, здесь использованы технологии других рас, но тебе об этом знать не полагается". {n}Маражай не отводит насмешливого взгляда от техножреца.{/n} "Иногда я поражаюсь, насколько примитивно искусство обмана у {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}. Побольше затейливых слов, щепотка таинственности, и вот твои слова уже внушают священный трепет".
traits.speaker: MarazhaiCompanion

languages.text: "To put it simply, yes, the technology of other races is used here, but you are not meant to know." {n}Marazhai does not lift his mocking gaze from the Tech-Priest.{/n} "Sometimes I'm amazed at how primitive the art of deception is among the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."
languages.original_text: "Говоря проще: да, здесь использованы технологии других рас, но тебе об этом знать не полагается". {n}Маражай не отводит насмешливого взгляда от техножреца.{/n} "Иногда я поражаюсь, насколько примитивно искусство обмана у {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}мон-кай{/g}. Побольше затейливых слов, щепотка таинственности, и вот твои слова уже внушают священный трепет".

Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."

Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."

"To put it simply, yes, the technology of other races is used here, but you are not meant to know." {n}Marazhai does not lift his mocking gaze from the Tech-Priest.{/n} "Sometimes I'm amazed at how primitive the art of deception is among the mon-keigh. Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."

languages.text: 「要するに、ええ、他種族の技術がここで使われているけれど、それは知ってはならないことよ」{n}マラズハイはテクプリストを見下ろしたまま言った。.{/n}「モンケィの欺瞞の技術は、実に原始的だ。ほんの少しの隠された言葉、ほんの少しの謎めいた雰囲気で、どんな古びた嘘でも恐怖と畏怖を呼び起こすことができるのだから」
languages.original_text: "To put it simply, yes, the technology of other races is used here, but you are not meant to know." {n}Marazhai does not lift his mocking gaze from the Tech-Priest.{/n} "Sometimes I'm amazed at how primitive the art of deception is among the mon-keigh. Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."

traits.locale_text: 「要するに、ええ、他種族の技術がここで使われているけれど、それは知ってはならないことよ」{n}マラーザイはテクプリストを見下ろしたまま言った。「モンケィの欺瞞の技術は、実に原始的だ。ほんの少しの隠された言葉、ほんの少しの謎めいた雰囲気で、どんな古びた嘘でも恐怖と畏怖を呼び起こすことができるのだから」

languages.text: “简而言之：没错，这里确实用了异族科技，但你不应该知道才对。”{n}玛拉斋那充满嘲弄的目光始终未离开技术神甫。{/n}“有时候我真是要惊叹，你们{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}的欺诈艺术竟如此原始。随便扯几个晦涩的词汇，故弄玄虚一番，任何千疮百孔的谎言就都能收获敬畏与恐惧了。”
languages.original_text: "To put it simply, yes, the technology of other races is used here, but you are not meant to know." {n}Marazhai does not lift his mocking gaze from the Tech-Priest.{/n} "Sometimes I'm amazed at how primitive the art of deception is among the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."

traits.locale_text: “简而言之：没错，这里确实用了异族科技，但你不应该知道才对。”{n}玛拉斋那充满嘲弄的目光始终未离开技术神甫。{/n}“有时候我真是要惊叹，你们{g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}猴子{/g}的欺诈艺术竟如此原始。随便扯几个晦涩的词汇，故弄玄虚一番，任何千疮百孔的谎言就都能收获敬畏与恐惧了。”

languages.text: «En términos más sencillos, sí, aquí se utiliza tecnología de otras razas, pero nadie debe saberlo». {n}Marazhai no aparta su mirada socarrona del tecnosacerdote.{/n} «En ocasiones, me impresiona el estado primitivo del arte del engaño entre los {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Unas palabras esotéricas, un toque de misterio y la mentira más lamentable inspira miedo y admiración».
languages.original_text: "To put it simply, yes, the technology of other races is used here, but you are not meant to know." {n}Marazhai does not lift his mocking gaze from the Tech-Priest.{/n} "Sometimes I'm amazed at how primitive the art of deception is among the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."

traits.locale_text: «En términos más sencillos, sí, aquí se utiliza tecnología de otras razas, pero nadie debe saberlo». {n}Marazhai no aparta su mirada socarrona del tecnosacerdote.{/n} «En ocasiones, me impresiona el estado primitivo del arte del engaño entre los {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Unas palabras esotéricas, un toque de misterio y la mentira más lamentable inspira miedo y admiración».

languages.text: "Einfach gesagt, ja, hier kommt die Technologie anderer Völker zum Einsatz, aber das geht Euch nichts an." {n}Marazhais spöttischer Blick ruht auf dem Techpriester.{/n} "Mitunter bin ich erstaunt, wie wenig entwickelt die Kunst der Täuschung unter den {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g} ist. Einige esoterische Worte, ein Hauch von Geheimnis und schon sorgt jede noch so fadenscheinige Lüge für Angst und Ehrfurcht."
languages.original_text: "To put it simply, yes, the technology of other races is used here, but you are not meant to know." {n}Marazhai does not lift his mocking gaze from the Tech-Priest.{/n} "Sometimes I'm amazed at how primitive the art of deception is among the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."

traits.locale_text: "Einfach gesagt, ja, hier kommt die Technologie anderer Völker zum Einsatz, aber das geht Euch nichts an." {n}Marazhais spöttischer Blick ruht auf dem Techpriester.{/n} "Mitunter bin ich erstaunt, wie wenig entwickelt die Kunst der Täuschung unter den {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}Chem-Pan-Sey{/g} ist. Einige esoterische Worte, ein Hauch von Geheimnis und schon sorgt jede noch so fadenscheinige Lüge für Angst und Ehrfurcht."

languages.text: « En termes simples, oui, la technologie d'autres races est utilisée ici, mais vous n'êtes pas {mf|censé|censée} le savoir, {n}explique Marazhai, sans quitter le technoprêtre de ses yeux moqueurs.{/n} Parfois, je suis stupéfait par le niveau primitif des {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} dans l'art de la duplicité. Il suffit de quelques mots ésotériques et d'un soupçon de mystère pour que le plus ténu des mensonges inspire la terreur. »
languages.original_text: "To put it simply, yes, the technology of other races is used here, but you are not meant to know." {n}Marazhai does not lift his mocking gaze from the Tech-Priest.{/n} "Sometimes I'm amazed at how primitive the art of deception is among the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."

traits.locale_text: « En termes simples, oui, la technologie d'autres races est utilisée ici, mais vous n'êtes pas {mf|censé|censée} le savoir, {n}explique Marazhai, sans quitter le technoprêtre de ses yeux moqueurs.{/n} Parfois, je suis stupéfait par le niveau primitif des {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g} dans l'art de la duplicité. Il suffit de quelques mots ésotériques et d'un soupçon de mystère pour que le plus ténu des mensonges inspire la terreur. »

languages.text: "Basitçe söylemek gerekirse evet, burada diğer ırkların teknolojisi kullanılıyor ancak bunu bilmeniz gerekmiyor." {n}Marazhai, alaycı bakışlarını Tekno Rahip'ten ayırmıyor.{/n} "Bazen aldatma sanatının {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keighler{/g} arasındaki ilkelliğine şaşırıyorum. Sadece birkaç ezoterik kelime, bir gizem ipucu ve herhangi bir bayağı yalan, korku ve huşu uyandırmaya yetiyor."
languages.original_text: "To put it simply, yes, the technology of other races is used here, but you are not meant to know." {n}Marazhai does not lift his mocking gaze from the Tech-Priest.{/n} "Sometimes I'm amazed at how primitive the art of deception is among the {g|Encyclopedia:MonKeigh}mon-keigh{/g}. Just a few esoteric words, a hint of mystery, and any threadbare lie can inspire fear and awe."

Sadece birkaç ezoterik kelime, bir gizem ipucu ve herhangi bir bayağı yalan, korku ve huşu uyandırmaya yetiyor."
